---
title: "personas.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\core\personas.py"
loc: 161
complexity: 21
logic_score: 4.53
style_score: 3.82
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 3.49
---

## Intent
The `personas.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on PersonaStrategy, __init__, enforce_policy, get_voice, retheme_docs, _quarantine, _sync_configs, OdinStrategy, get_voice, _get_sovereign_state, retheme_docs, _res, enforce_policy, _create_cursor_rules, _create_standard_agents, AlfredStrategy, get_voice, enforce_policy, _create_cursor_rules, _create_minimal_agents, get_strategy, PersonaRegistry, get_strategy. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via PersonaStrategy, __init__, enforce_policy, get_voice, retheme_docs, _quarantine, _sync_configs, OdinStrategy, get_voice, _get_sovereign_state, retheme_docs, _res, enforce_policy, _create_cursor_rules, _create_standard_agents, AlfredStrategy, get_voice, enforce_policy, _create_cursor_rules, _create_minimal_agents, get_strategy, PersonaRegistry, get_strategy. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 27 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [shutil](file://shutil)
- [time](file://time)
- [datetime](file://datetime)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [msvcrt](file://msvcrt)
- [src.core.utils](file://src.core.utils)
- [re](file://re)

### Exports
- `PersonaStrategy`
- `__init__`
- `enforce_policy`
- `get_voice`
- `retheme_docs`
- `_quarantine`
- `_sync_configs`
- `OdinStrategy`
- `get_voice`
- `_get_sovereign_state`
- `retheme_docs`
- `_res`
- `enforce_policy`
- `_create_cursor_rules`
- `_create_standard_agents`
- `AlfredStrategy`
- `get_voice`
- `enforce_policy`
- `_create_cursor_rules`
- `_create_minimal_agents`
- `get_strategy`
- `PersonaRegistry`
- `get_strategy`
